things.name: Tai National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage last remaining primary forest in West Africa

things.name: Basilique Notre-Dame de la Paix (Yamoussoukro)
things.description: The world's largest church - larger than St Peter's in Rome, 3 hours from Abidjan

things.name: Banco National Park
things.description: Urban rainforest park within the city boundaries

things.name: Musee des Civilisations de Cote d'Ivoire
things.description: West African masks, Senufo bronzes and Dan tribe sculptures

things.name: Plateau Business District
things.description: West Africa's most impressive skyline with the Houphouet-Boigny Bridge

things.name: Le Village Artisanal de la Pyramide
things.description: Arts and crafts market with Kente cloth, masks, ivory and bronze

things.name: Assinie Beach
things.description: Atlantic beach 85km east of Abidjan with lagoons and resort hotels

things.name: Grand-Bassam
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage former colonial capital on a lagoon - Art Nouveau buildings

things.name: Marche de Cocody
things.description: Vibrant neighbourhood market with fresh produce and street food

things.name: Attieke with Grilled Fish
things.description: Ivory Coast's national dish - cassava couscous with grilled tilapia and alloco fried plantains
